# ankitranjan.dev

> Senior Mobile Engineer portfolio and technical blog

## About
Ankit Ranjan is a Senior Mobile Engineer with 7+ years of experience building apps across Android, iOS, and Flutter. This site contains technical deep-dives, blog posts, and professional information.

## Content

### Deep Dives (Dart Programming Series)
In-depth technical tutorials on Dart and Flutter fundamentals:
- /deep-dives/dart-booleans/ - Booleans in Dart
- /deep-dives/dart-integers/ - Integers in Dart
- /deep-dives/dart-doubles/ - Doubles and IEEE 754
- /deep-dives/dart-doubles-part2/ - Doubles Memory and Edge Cases
- /deep-dives/dart-strings/ - Strings, Immutability, Unicode
- /deep-dives/dart-collections/ - Lists, Sets, Maps
- /deep-dives/dart-functions/ - Functions, Closures, Tear-offs

### Blog
Technical articles on Flutter, mobile development, and software engineering:
- /blog/ - All blog posts

### Notes
Quick thoughts and observations:
- /notes/ - All notes
